title: $100 million New Jersey deli fraud defendant Patten wants no prison time despite past conviction
summary_full: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.
summary_public: James Patten is the person to be sentenced for a scheme that sent the market capitalization of a company that owned just a small New Jersey deli soaring.
